summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Business Card feature. All 19 backend API tests passed (POST /api/catalog/order/businesscard with editor/pdf modes, validation, file uploads). All frontend tests passed: Tab 2 shows service selector (Katalog/Visitkort), Visitkort shows source toggle (Designa själv/Ladda upp PDF), editor has live preview with 3 templates and 8 colors, form submission works. Admin /admin/catalogs shows 19 business card orders with Visitkort filter and VISITKORTSINFO section displaying card_details.
critical_code_review_comments: catalog.py: POST /order/businesscard correctly handles both editor and pdf source modes
catalog.py: PDF mode validation correctly requires PDF file with 'PDF-fil krävs' error
catalog.py: Logo file upload works with proper size validation (10MB max)
catalog.py: card_details object correctly stores name, title, company, phone, email, website, address, template, color
BusinessCardEditor.js: Live preview updates in real-time when typing card details
BusinessCardEditor.js: 3 templates (Klassisk/Modern/Minimal) with correct data-testid attributes
BusinessCardEditor.js: 8 accent colors with checkmark indicator on selected color
BusinessCatalog.js: Service selector (Katalog/Visitkort) with correct data-testid attributes
BusinessCatalog.js: Source toggle (Designa själv/Ladda upp PDF) correctly shows/hides editor vs PDF upload
AdminCatalogs.js: Visitkort filter correctly filters businesscard order_type
AdminCatalogs.js: VISITKORTSINFO section displays card_details (name, title, company, template)
seed_data_creation: Created test business card orders during backend testing (TEST_ prefixed companies for editor and pdf modes)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Business Card feature fully tested. POST /api/catalog/order/businesscard accepts multipart form with: company_name, contact_person, email, phone, address, postal_code, city, quantity, message, source (editor/pdf), card_name, card_title, card_company, card_phone, card_email, card_website, card_address, card_template, card_color, pdf_file (optional), logo_file (optional). GET /api/catalog/orders returns businesscard orders with order_type='businesscard', source field, and card_details object. Frontend /foretag Tab 2 has service selector (data-testid: service-catalog, service-businesscard), source toggle (data-testid: card-source-editor, card-source-pdf), editor with templates (data-testid: template-classic/modern/minimal) and colors (data-testid: color-{hex}). Admin /admin/catalogs has filter-businesscard button showing VISITKORTSINFO section.

Backend POST /api/catalog/order/business.PDF file upload: ✓ Creates order with source=pdf, saves PDF

Backend GET /api/catalog/orders.card_details field: ✓ Contains name, title, company, template, color

Frontend /foretag Tab 2.Source toggle: ✓ Designa själv / Ladda upp PDF toggle
